description:
Post-refactoring re-verification of original 25 Catseye findings. 16/25 are now fixed (Actor pattern resolved most P0/P1 concurrency issues). This epic tracks the 4 still-applies and 5 partially-fixed items.

## Still Applies (4)
- WebSocket dev-mode Origin bypass (P1)
- Bare rescue in models.cr (P3)
- URL normalizer strips query strings (P3, intentional)
- STOP_WORDS duplicates (P3)

## Partially Fixed (5)
- SSRF DNS rebinding narrow fallback gap (P1)
- Admin auth logging incomplete (P2)
- Double tab iteration in feed_service (P3)
- Redundant count_timeline_items CTE (P2)
- Bare rescue in cleanup_store.cr (P3)
title: [EPIC] Resolve remaining Catseye findings after refactoring
